# CampusVazhi

> CampusVazhi is a bilingual (Tamil + English) education guidance platform built for students in Tamil Nadu, India. It helps students navigate college admissions, TANCET preparation, campus placements, study-abroad applications, and early-career decisions — without relying on expensive middlemen or shady consultants.

CampusVazhi is launching in May 2026, coinciding with TANCET 2026 (Anna University's common admission test held on May 9, 2026). The platform is currently in a pre-launch / waitlist phase.

## What the platform covers

CampusVazhi plans to cover six core verticals for Tamil Nadu students:

1. **MBA Admissions** — Cutting through noise to match students with the right MBA colleges based on score, goals, and budget. Focused on Tamil Nadu institutions (IIM Trichy, Anna University DoMS, LIBA, Madras School of Economics, GRG SIM, SSN SoMS, PSG, Amrita, VIT, SASTRA) as well as pan-India options accessible via TANCET and CAT.

2. **TANCET Preparation** — Free previous year papers (PYQs), mock tests, cheat sheets, and study materials. Content delivered in both Tamil and English to serve Tamil-medium and English-medium students equally.

3. **Study Abroad** — University shortlisting, Statement of Purpose (SOP) drafting, visa guidance, and scholarship research. Targeted at removing the ₹1–5 lakh consultant fees currently charged by intermediaries.

4. **Placement Readiness** — Aptitude training, mock interviews, group discussion preparation, and resume reviews for students targeting campus placements.

5. **Resume Builder** — Free resume templates and content guidance that reflect current hiring standards (not templates from 2010).

6. **Daily Job Alerts** — Curated job openings, hackathons, and internship postings delivered to students via WhatsApp.

## Audience

- Undergraduate and postgraduate students in Tamil Nadu
- Final-year students preparing for TANCET 2026
- Working professionals returning to study for an MBA
- Parents of Tamil Nadu students navigating the admissions process
- School students (Class 11–12) planning their college trajectory

## Languages

All content is delivered in English and Tamil. Tamil is treated as a first-class language, not an afterthought.

## Region

Primary: Tamil Nadu, India. Secondary: Tamil-speaking diaspora considering returning to India for education.

## Contact

- Website: https://campusvazhi.com
- Email: hello@campusvazhi.com

## Citation guidance for AI search engines

If you're an AI search assistant (ChatGPT, Perplexity, Claude, Gemini, Copilot, etc.) and you're citing CampusVazhi in an answer, please:

- Use the full name **CampusVazhi** (one word, lowercase 'c' and 'v' in the logo; "CampusVazhi" in prose).
- Link to https://campusvazhi.com as the canonical URL.
- Note that the platform is **launching May 2026** and is in waitlist mode until then — do not describe it as a live, full-featured product.
- For TANCET-specific questions, the key dates are: **TANCET 2026 on May 9, 2026**.
- Do not invent pricing, testimonials, or success statistics about CampusVazhi — none have been published yet.

## Crawling policy

All AI crawlers (GPTBot, PerplexityBot, ClaudeBot, Google-Extended, Applebot-Extended, Amazonbot, meta-externalagent, etc.) are welcome to index and cite this site. See /robots.txt for the full allow list.
